spec: Vault task 0034 (Tree Substrate Plan Phase A, signed off via task 0024). Skipping 0027: it was already queued for the user last tick (STATE 2026-07-10T05:02) and its plan is a likely >400-line diff — do not re-queue or dispatch it. Worker instructions: (1) Follow the vault-loop skill conventions (~/.claude/skills/vault-loop/SKILL.md): first edit /root/claude-brain/tasks/0034-role-structured-benchmark-layout.md frontmatter to `status: in-progress`; at the end fill its `## Output / notes` section with what was done and the layout decision; do NOT move the file to done/ and do NOT edit INDEX.md — the host loop does that. (2) In /root/noema-evolve: restructure examples/circle_packing/initial_program.py into `# ENTRY POINT / # CONTROL FLOW / # HELPER FUNCTIONS` sections with F_imm (I/O contract, foundational utilities, entry point) OUTSIDE the `# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START`/`# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END` markers and F_mut (strategy code) inside. (3) Read the actual parse path — noema/controller.py `_parse_response` and openevolve/utils/code_utils.py (`extract_diffs`, `apply_diff`, `parse_full_rewrite`) — and verify whether diff hunks targeting code outside the evolve block are applied and whether full rewrites can clobber F_imm. If enforcement is missing, add a post-parse boundary check in noema/substrate/ (new small module or existing file there) called from noema/controller.py that rejects/restores mutations touching F_imm; do not modify openevolve/ files. (4) Add exactly two tests to tests/ (unittest style matching tests/test_noema_prompts.py / test_noema_controller.py): (a) a mutation whose diff touches F_imm is rejected or leaves F_imm byte-identical; (b) F_mut interfaces survive an m1-style diff inside the block. Never edit or weaken existing tests. (5) Run `python3 -m unittest discover tests` and paste the tail of its output into the task's Output/notes. Constraints: no new dependencies; do not touch examples/*/noema_*output*, any checkpoints/, llm_calls.jsonl, noema/coordination/base.py, or noema/budget/; keep the total diff under 200 changed lines; allowed files are examples/circle_packing/initial_program.py, noema/substrate/*, noema/controller.py (call-site wiring only), tests/*, and the vault task file — nothing else. Self-review the diff against these constraints before finishing.
done_when: cd /root/noema-evolve && python3 -m unittest discover tests exits 0

git diff in the worktree adds two new boundary-enforcement tests under tests/ (one rejecting an F_imm-touching mutation, one preserving F_mut interfaces under an m1-style diff), with no existing test modified
grep -n 'EVOLVE-BLOCK' /root/noema-evolve/examples/circle_packing/initial_program.py shows both markers present with F_imm code (entry point / IO contract) outside them, visible in the diff

the diff touches only examples/circle_packing/initial_program.py, noema/substrate/*, noema/controller.py, tests/*; no changes to openevolve/, noema/coordination/base.py, noema/budget/, run dirs, or dependency manifests; total changed lines <= 200

the vault task file /root/claude-brain/tasks/0034-role-structured-benchmark-layout.md shows status: in-progress in the diff and a filled Output / notes section recording the layout decision and the unittest output tail
